elements.title: Élisabeth Le Bas
elements.contents: ... that French revolutionary Élisabeth Le Bas (pictured) declared that she would never accept a pension from her husband's "assassins", signing the statement with her own blood?

elements.title: Tennessee State Route 155
elements.contents: ... that the construction of Tennessee State Route 155 in Nashville facilitated the development of an entertainment district anchored by the relocated Grand Ole Opry in the 1970s?

elements.title: The Magical Revolution of the Reincarnated Princess and the Genius Young Lady
elements.contents: ... that a narrative element in The Magical Revolution of the Reincarnated Princess and the Genius Young Lady was described as "explicitly [...] about class conflict"?

elements.title: Sirex obesus
elements.contents: ... that female Sirex obesus insert fungal spores and a toxic mucous secretion, alongside their eggs, into their pine tree host?

elements.title: Pinky Up
elements.contents: ... that Elon Musk's daughter appeared in the music video for "Pinky Up"?

elements.title: a Nazi concentration camp survivor
elements.contents: ... that a Polish street was named after a Nazi concentration camp survivor who walked down it every day to get to the church in which he worked?

elements.title: a Taiwanese open knowledge base
elements.contents: ... that AI agents built the initial structure of a Taiwanese open knowledge base in 24 hours?

elements.title: Arnold Korff
elements.contents: ... that Arnold Korff worked as a mechanical engineer and a cowboy before becoming an actor?

elements.title: men's 102 kg weightlifting competition at the 2024 Summer Olympics
elements.contents: ... that the "man to beat" was beaten in the men's 102 kg weightlifting competition at the 2024 Summer Olympics?
